_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: Expression of ErbB2-V659E in WT SC NPCs resulted in a 1.4-fold increase in cell growth (neurosphere diameter), a 2.6-fold decrease in cell death, and a 2.6-fold increase in glial differentiation
details: Expression of constitutively-activated ErbB2 (V659E) in WT SC NPCs resulted in 1.4-fold increase in cell growth, 2.6-fold decrease in cell death, and 2.6-fold increase in glial differentiation
